name: Soup Time Cat Creamy Treats Tuna & Bonito 70g
shortDescription: A premium, healthy, and hydrating lickable treat your cat will absolutely love! Perfect as a reward, a tasty snack, or even as a topping to enhance dry food.
description: Soup Time Creamy is a healthy and hydrating lickable treat. Serve it on a dish or feed your cat directly from the tube as a special reward. Soup Time Creamy treats are natural, tasty, and full of essential nutrients. Add some tasty variation to your cat’s diet with Soup Time Creamy treats—delicious or as a dry food topping. Ingredients: Tuna, Bonito, Chicken, Starch, Taurine, Vitamins (A, B2, B3, B5, D3, E), Xanthan Gum. Nutritional Analysis: Crude Protein: 6.5% (min) Crude Fat: 0.1% (min) Crude Fiber: 0.5% (max) Moisture: 90% (max) Why Choose Soup Time? Premium Quality – crafted with natural, wholesome ingredients. Lickable & Easy to Digest – ideal for cats of all ages. Hydrating Formula – supports your cat’s daily fluid intake. No Artificial Colors or Preservatives – just pure goodness. Serving Suggestions: Serve directly from the tube, in a dish, or drizzle over dry kibble for an irresistible treat.
